title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
summary_full: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
summary_public: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships
